categories.name: Backend Applications
categories.description: API and service starters for FastAPI and similar Python backends.
categories.details: Use when the deliverable is an HTTP API or background worker — FastAPI for async APIs with OpenAPI docs.

categories.name: Tooling
categories.description: Extensions that add CI, containers, databases, and developer ergonomics.
categories.details: Layer these on top of a compatible template after choosing your base stack.

templates.name: FastAPI Starter
templates.description: Production-ready FastAPI API with uv, Ruff, pytest, and pydantic-settings

templates.name: FastAPI Typed Starter
templates.description: FastAPI starter with strict typing support, mypy, pyright, and type-focused developer tooling

extensions.name: GitHub Setup
extensions.description: GitHub Actions CI, Dependabot, issue templates, and PR template

extensions.name: Python Docker
extensions.description: Dockerfile, compose.yml, and compose.prod.yml for local and containerized runs

extensions.name: Python Postgres
extensions.description: PostgreSQL service under docker/postgres/compose.yml plus env examples

extensions.name: Python Dev Container
extensions.description: VS Code Dev Container with Python 3.12 and uv
